blended.narrative: Searchmont is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 36°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
